case_title: MARJORIE MAMARIL RIMANDO VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREETMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE PREVIOUS COURT DATE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO TRIAL WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF THE MEDIATORS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-29-2019 IF THE AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF MARJORIE MAMARIL RIMANDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RIMANDO, MARJORIE MAMARIL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
